steps.title: Evaluate P(0) at the start of the study
steps.content:
Since $t = 0$ means the study began (by definition), substitute $t = 0$ into the function:

$$P(0) = 1,800(1.02)^0 = 1,800 \cdot 1 = 1,800$$

steps.title: Interpret the meaning
steps.content: At the start of the study ($t = 0$), the function gives 1,800, which represents the estimated number of marine mammals in the area when the study began. That matches choice B — B is correct.
